title: Technetium
description: A mod that adds an ore called Technetium.
body:
## What does it add?
- Raw Technetium
- Technetium Ingot
- Technetium Powder
- Crushed Raw Technetium
- Technetium Sheet
- Raw Technetium Block
- Technetium Block
- Technetium Ore
- Deepslate Technetium Ore

## Why should I download this?
This mod is in a series of mods that will include a lot of the metals on the periodic table of elements. A mod will include all of the ores, allowing for individual decisions of what ores you want.

## Will it be updated for old versions?
This mod will only be for fabric and I will not be updating to old MC versions as well as not updating old versions of the mod.

## Are there dependencies?

### Required
- Fabric API.

### Optional
- Create Fabric (as of v1.0.1)
